title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-QSFP28-SR4 - Optical module, Multi-Mode, 100 Gbps, MPO-12 UPC
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / QSFP28
description: An optical module operating at speeds of up to 100 Gb/s . The module is compatible with QSFP28 and QSFP+ interfaces. It works in Multi-mode and ensures a range of up to 100 m Data transfer rate up to 100 Gb/s Range of up to 100 m Multi-mode MPO-12 Type B UPC connector
